prose:
Fukui reactivity indices for phenol were computed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier 'standard') in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Exact four-center integrals were used (no density fitting / RI). The geometry was the user-supplied frozen phenol.xyz (single-point; no re-optimization). N±1 states: cation (charge +1, mult 2), anion (charge −1, mult 2). Partial charges were partitioned via Mulliken (PySCF). Integrity status: ok, trustworthy: true; both charge-conservation checks passed (sum(f+) = 1.0000, sum(f−) = 1.0000). No warnings were reported by the engine.

Headline result — most electrophilic atom: Atom 3 (C), f⁺ = 2.1028319. Most nucleophilic atom: Atom 1 (O), f⁻ = 0.16201477.

Full per-atom results (atom index 1-based, symbol, f+, f−, f⁰, dual descriptor):
1  O   f+=−0.99514  f−= 0.16201  f⁰=−0.41656  dual=−1.15715
2  C   f+= 0.39933  f−= 0.04877  f⁰= 0.22405  dual= 0.35056
3  C   f+= 2.10283  f−= 0.07097  f⁰= 1.08690  dual= 2.03186  ← most electrophilic
4  C   f+= 1.61968  f−= 0.07050  f⁰= 0.84509  dual= 1.54918
5  C   f+=−0.34201  f−= 0.02670  f⁰=−0.15765  dual=−0.36871
6  C   f+=−0.28911  f−= 0.02095  f⁰=−0.13408  dual=−0.31006
7  C   f+= 1.30798  f−= 0.12352  f⁰= 0.71575  dual= 1.18446
8  H   f+=−0.73392  f−= 0.08232  f⁰=−0.32580  dual=−0.81624
9  H   f+=−0.27466  f−= 0.08815  f⁰=−0.09325  dual=−0.36280
10 H   f+=−0.91706  f−= 0.08111  f⁰=−0.41798  dual=−0.99817
11 H   f+=−0.62992  f−= 0.08049  f⁰=−0.27471  dual=−0.71040
12 H   f+=−0.29592  f−= 0.09350  f⁰=−0.10121  dual=−0.38941
13 H   f+= 0.04790  f−= 0.05101  f⁰= 0.04946  dual=−0.00311

Note: Mulliken-based Fukui indices can yield unphysical negative values for individual atoms due to charge-partitioning artifacts; the relative ordering and identities of the most reactive sites remain chemically meaningful.
